name: Norwegian Meat Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Julienne strips of cooked Beef, veal, or lamb
1 cup Julienne strips of baked or boiled ham
1/4 cup Heavy cream or sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cut meats with onion.
2. Beat together the oil, vinegar, pepper, and parsley in a separate bowl.
3. Stir the cream into the dressing mixture.
4. Combine the dressing with the meats, mixing lightly.
5. Garnish with sliced egg and beet.
6. Serve as a main dish salad.
